headline: Crimson Tide Pods: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: Crimson Tide Pods is projected #15 of 16 with a 65.45 championship-lineup C-AVI average, led by DeVonta Smith, Alec Pierce, and Justin Herbert. The immediate priority is improving the FLEX slot without weakening that core.

projected_power.method: Verified championship-lineup C-AVI average from all 16 AVI-Core knowledge team files

latest_trade.summary: On June 30, Crimson Tide Pods traded with Conquistadors, Northside Kings and acquired Alec Pierce, 2027 Round 1 (original roster 10), 2027 Round 2 (original roster 5) while sending Harold Fannin, Mike Evans. Alec Pierce is now the current WR starter at 75.1 C-AVI and 78.5 D-AVI; The deal added 2 draft assets.

gap_closing_moves: Raise the FLEX slot above Jerry Jeudy's 49.1 C-AVI baseline; a replacement near 70.8 C-AVI would directly attack the 2.71-point projected gap to Rapid Valley Annihilation.
Use draft capital as a targeted sweetener for a verified starting-lineup upgrade, not for additional bench depth.

latest_trade.summary: On July 15, Northside Kings traded with Ravens Regime and acquired RJ Harvey, Bhayshul Tuten, 2026 Round 2 (original roster 2) while sending Tyler Warren. RJ Harvey is now the current RB starter at 62.3 C-AVI and 75.2 D-AVI; Bhayshul Tuten is now the current RB starter at 72.9 C-AVI and 78.7 D-AVI; The deal added 1 draft asset.

rival_below.summary: On July 15, Northside Kings traded with Ravens Regime and acquired RJ Harvey, Bhayshul Tuten, 2026 Round 2 (original roster 2) while sending Tyler Warren. RJ Harvey is now the current RB starter at 62.3 C-AVI and 75.2 D-AVI; Bhayshul Tuten is now the current RB starter at 72.9 C-AVI and 78.7 D-AVI; The deal added 1 draft asset.

sections.title: Projected Power Position
sections.body: Projected #15 of 16 at 65.45 lineup C-AVI. Rapid Valley Annihilation is immediately above at 68.16, a gap of 2.71. Northside Kings is immediately behind at 61.44.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are DeVonta Smith (87.5), Alec Pierce (75.1), and Justin Herbert (72.2).

sections.title: Latest Trade Impact
sections.body: On June 30, Crimson Tide Pods traded with Conquistadors, Northside Kings and acquired Alec Pierce, 2027 Round 1 (original roster 10), 2027 Round 2 (original roster 5) while sending Harold Fannin, Mike Evans. Alec Pierce is now the current WR starter at 75.1 C-AVI and 78.5 D-AVI; The deal added 2 draft assets.

sections.title: Moves to Close the Gap
sections.body: Raise the FLEX slot above Jerry Jeudy's 49.1 C-AVI baseline; a replacement near 70.8 C-AVI would directly attack the 2.71-point projected gap to Rapid Valley Annihilation. Use draft capital as a targeted sweetener for a verified starting-lineup upgrade, not for additional bench depth.

sections.title: Lineup Pressure Point
sections.body: Jerry Jeudy is the lowest C-AVI starter in the verified championship lineup at 49.1. Any acquisition should clear that exact lineup threshold.

sections.title: Availability
sections.body: All 11 offensive players in the current team file are marked Active.
